a_image.alt: Frutiger Aero style mood board — Design Era · 2004–2013

sections.a_eyebrow: Retro · Nostalgic · Rounded · Glossy · Bold Colors
sections.a_description: Glossy bubbles floating over sky-blue gradients, translucent glass panels catching the light, and the warm optimism of nature meeting technology — Frutiger Aero is the aesthetic that defined the Windows Vista and Windows 7 era. Named after typeface designer Adrian Frutiger, it blends rounded, friendly typography with luminous surfaces, soft reflections, and an almost utopian belief that digital interfaces should feel as alive and inviting as a sunny day.

You'll find Frutiger Aero's influence on early smartphone app designs, weather widgets, media player skins from the late 2000s, and the nostalgic revival movement that has turned it into a beloved internet aesthetic. Modern designers reach for this style when building feel-good landing pages, wellness apps, and creative portfolios that want to channel pre-flat-design warmth and dimensionality.

a_image_cover.alt: Frutiger Aero style use case illustration
Frutiger Aero style use case illustration
Frutiger Aero style use case illustration

sections.a_description: Sky-blue gradient background (#4fc3f7 to #0288d1) evoking the Windows Vista/7 era of glossy, nature-infused digital optimism. The root has a radial gradient with a bright white-to-transparent circle in the upper-left corner simulating a glassy light reflection. A pseudo-element adds floating translucent white bubbles via radial-gradient circles. The .inner panel has a semi-transparent white background (rgba(255,255,255,0.25)) with backdrop-filter blur, a 1px white luminous border, and generous 20px border-radius — the hallmark frosted-glass card of the Aero era. Text is white with subtle drop shadows. Buttons are glossy pill shapes with a linear-gradient shine (white-to-transparent overlay). Set in Nunito — a rounded, friendly sans-serif whose soft terminals mirror the bubbly, approachable personality of Frutiger Aero. Heading at weight 800, 30px, line-height 1.2, letter-spacing -0.5px. Body at weight 400, 15px, line-height 1.7. Eyebrow at weight 600, 12px, uppercase, 2px letter-spacing. Buttons at weight 700, uppercase, 1px letter-spacing, fully rounded (50px border-radius). Primary button: glossy green gradient (#66bb6a to #43a047) with white text and a top highlight. Secondary: semi-transparent white with blur. Hover states add a brighter glow and slight lift. Alternatives: Quicksand (geometric rounded), Varela Round (softer single-story), Comfortaa (wide rounded geometric).
